summary: Backend-only testing of HIPAA access-audit logging (iteration 105). Built /app/backend/tests/test_hipaa_audit_logs_iteration105.py (20 tests covering login/procedure-view/PDF-export audit hooks + admin viewer RBAC/filters/validation + index verification). 19 passed, 1 skipped (in-process index check — verified separately via motor). Regressions (iter_103 + iter_104) re-run: 31 passed, 1 skipped. Secrets redaction verified live in backend access log (token=<redacted>). access_logs indexes confirmed: TTL 180d on created_at, (user_id, created_at desc), (resource_type, resource_id, created_at desc). 30 rows already present — collection retained as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 9765 lines — far above the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting audit/auth/procedure/PDF/scheduler into separate routers/services.

log_access stores user_id as the stringified Mongo ObjectId, while the login API response exposes the same value under the key 'id'. Naming parity (either always 'id' in audit rows, or always expose '_id' in user payload) would reduce client-side confusion.

_SensitiveLogRedactor covers 'Bearer' and '?token=' but not 'refresh_token=' or 'access_token=' query strings — consider extending the regex to 'access_token=' / 'refresh_token=' / 'api_key=' for defence-in-depth.

generate_case_report only audits on the success path. If a user attempts PDF export and is denied (403) or the case is incomplete (400), no 'pdf_export / denied' row is written. Low priority but useful for compliance symmetry.
log_access swallows ALL exceptions silently (logging.error only). For HIPAA audit-trail integrity it might be worth adding a circuit-breaker / alert hook when repeated insert failures happen.
The admin viewer accepts free-text action/outcome filters without enumerating allowed values. Consider a Literal[] whitelist to prevent accidental mis-typed filters returning 'no data' silently.

seed_data_creation: Generated ~30 real access_logs rows during testing (login successes/failures, procedure_view success+denied, pdf_export). Collection left intact per main-agent request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HIPAA audit logging infra is green. Reusable pytest file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_hipaa_audit_logs_iteration105.py. Known test procedure id: 69cf9bdfdafb502718057bcd (student Gaurav.pandey, sup Paresh.gandhi, IC Abhijit.patil). access_logs.user_id = stringified Mongo ObjectId; matches user['id'] from /api/auth/login response. Secrets redactor already proven (see backend.err.log 'token=<redacted>').
